diagrams.title: Many-to-One Thread Model
diagrams.description: Shows multiple user threads mapped to a single kernel thread
elements: Three user threads (User T1, T2, T3)
Arrow showing all user threads mapping to one kernel thread
Note: If User T1 blocks, all block
diagrams.purpose: Understand the simplest threading model and its limitation

diagrams.title: One-to-One Thread Model
diagrams.description: Shows one-to-one mapping between user threads and kernel threads
elements: Three user threads (User T1, T2, T3)
Three kernel threads (Kernel T1, T2, T3)
One-to-one arrows between user and kernel threads
Note: True parallelism possible, each can run independently
diagrams.purpose: Understand the most common modern threading model

diagrams.title: Many-to-Many Thread Model
diagrams.description: Shows flexible multiplexing of user threads to kernel threads
elements: User Space with five user threads (T1-T5)
Multiplexing showing multiple user threads sharing kernel threads
Note: Can optimize kernel thread count, no blocking of entire process
diagrams.purpose: Understand the most flexible threading model with optimal resource usage
